# Jetpack Watch Face library, Datastream is GA, Bazel Con recap, and more dev news!

<SocialEmbed platform="youtube" id="noK1Hnc4LrA" />

## Description

TL;DR 273 | The Google Developer News Show

0:00- Introduction 
0:11- Join Cloud Learn to build your Google Cloud skills → https://goo.gle/3y1M1zt 
0:45- Develop Watch faces with Stable Jetpack Watch Face Library → https://goo.gle/31HIzh2 
1:27- Datastream now Generally available → https://goo.gle/3IEZ0ft 
1:58- Bazel Con 2021 Wrap Up → https://goo.gle/3rIklhO 
2:34- Recognizing the 2021 TensorFlow Contributor Awardees → https://goo.gle/33d99zL 
3:01-  Please remember to like, subscribe, and share! 

Here to bring you the latest developer news from across Google is Developer Advocate Rody Davis. Tune in every week for a new episode, and let us know what you think of the latest announcements in the comments below! 😃

Follow Google Developers on Instagram → https://goo.gle/googledevs             

Watch more #DevShow → https://goo.gle/GDevShow               
Subscribe to Google Developers → https://goo.gle/developers 

#Google #Developers

## Transcript

### Introduction

**0:00** · \[MUSIC PLAYING\] RODY DAVIS: I'm Rody Davis for "The Developer Show".

**0:06** · This is your weekly update on the coolest developer news from Google.

**0:10** · To get us started, Google is hosting a Cloud Learn digital training event for developers, IT professionals, and data practitioners of all career levels on December 8 and 9 at no cost.

### Join Cloud Learn to build your Google Cloud skills

**0:20** · For those in Europe, the Middle East, and Africa, the event will be on December 9 to 10.

**0:25** · The interactive event's purpose is to help equip more than 40 million people with Google Cloud skills.

**0:31** · It'll also include live technical demos, Q&amp;As, career development workshops, covering everything from Google Cloud fundamentals to certification prep.

**0:40** · You can check out a full listing of everything to expect at cloudonair.withgoogle.com.

### Develop Watch faces with Stable Jetpack Watch Face Library

**0:46** · Over at Android, the Watch Face Studio from Samsung is revealing its Jetpack watch face library.

**0:50** · The newly announced developer tool creates watch faces without writing any code.

**0:55** · The Kotlin-developed library is also useful for developers with a more fine-tuned control.

**1:00** · The release also includes functionality from the Wearables support library, with new features to support customization on smartwatches and a system companion app on mobile.

**1:09** · If you use the Jetpack library to save your watch face configuration options, the values are synced with the mobile companion app.

**1:16** · The mobile app will also automatically present those options in an intuitive interface with previews that update real-time.

**1:23** · A link to all the new features with the library will be in the description box below.

### Datastream now Generally available

**1:27** · All right, circling back to cloud, Data Stream, Google Cloud's serverless change data capture and replication service, is now generally available.

**1:34** · This allows you to synchronize data across databases, stored systems, and applications reliably with minimal latency.

**1:41** · This will also support real-time analytics, database replication, and event-driven architectures.

**1:47** · It will also allow you to deliver change streams to Oracle and MySQL databases into Google Cloud Services like BigQuery, Cloud SQL, Google Cloud Storage, and Cloud Spanner.

**1:57** · And we can't forget about BazelCon 2021.

### Bazel Con 2021 Wrap Up

**2:00** · This year's attendees had a chance to interact with the community through a series of Birds of a Feather sessions with live Q&amp;As.

**2:07** · Other sessions included reproducible builds with Bazel, embedded platform testing with remote execution, and Bazelizing a gigantic iOS app, and so much more.

**2:16** · Also announced, the updated version of the next-gen multilanguage, multiplatform build, Bazel 5.0, which will release soon.

**2:24** · It includes a new dependency system called Bazel mod.

**2:28** · For answers to any of your questions regarding BazelCon 2021, you can reach out to bazelcon-planning@google.com.

### Recognizing the 2021 TensorFlow Contributor Awardees

**2:35** · And finally, we wanted to recognize the TensorFlow Contributor awardees for 2021.

**2:39** · Contributors to the TensorFlow PA write code, teach classes, and answer questions on forums, plus they organize and host events.

**2:46** · This year's categories include the SIG Leadership Award, Active SIG Award, and TensorFlow Forum Award, Diversity Inclusion Award, and so much more.

**2:54** · Congrats to all this year's participants.

**2:57** · Make sure to check out the link in the post for the full list of this year's awardees.

### Please remember to like, subscribe, and share!

**3:02** · To learn more about all these week's stories, make sure to check the description box below for all the links.

**3:07** · Please make sure to like and subscribe, share, and stay safe.

**3:10** · I'm Rody for "The Developer Show".

**3:12** · Thanks for watching, and we'll see you next week.

**3:17** · All right.
